title: Apple raises prices for MacBooks and iPads, as costs soar over AI
description: SAN FRANCISCO — Apple said Thursday it was raising prices for its MacBook computers, iPad tablets and other products, citing spiraling memory and storage costs sparked by the rise of artificial intelligence.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO — Apple said Thursday it was raising prices for its MacBook computers, iPad tablets and other products, citing spiraling memory and storage costs sparked by the rise of artificial intelligence.

title: Story Protocol Rebrands as Data Network in AI Training Pivot After IP Token Falls 98%
description: Intellectual property network Story Protocol has shifted its focus to a new opportunity in training data for artificial intelligence.
content:
Story Protocol, the decentralized network originally designed to revolutionize the intellectual property industry, has rebranded to Data Network amid a strategic refocus on artificial intelligence.

title: Google adds AI guidance to Demand Gen campaigns
description: Advertisers can now use a wider range of formats and get artificial intelligence assistance for their promotions.
content:
Google announced updates to its Demand Gen ads, including the capacity to utilize a wider range of video formats. The company also added artificial intelligence-powered campaign recommendations and new insights into customer acquisition paths.

title: Apple increases prices for Macs and iPads, blaming a shortage of memory chips

title: Wall Street drifts in mixed trading
description: The U.S. stock market is drifting in mixed trading Thursday after several artificial-intelligence stocks veered back up their roller-coaster ride, while Apple dropped after hiking prices on many of its products.
content:
NEW YORK — The U.S. stock market is drifting in mixed trading Thursday after several artificial-intelligence stocks veered back up their roller-coaster ride, while Apple dropped after hiking prices on many of its products.
